tasks.title: Add contractor to EDU Support Huddle invite
tasks.description: Invite the contractor to the recurring EDU Support Huddle before their start date.

tasks.title: Send welcome email with onboarding doc
tasks.description: Use the standard template and include the link to the contractor onboarding program.

tasks.title: Complete orientation Lessonly courses
tasks.description: Welcome to Handshake, Global Support intro, tools overview, Zendesk basics, customer service foundations.

tasks.title: Review Week 1 Lessonly completion
tasks.description: Verify all assigned orientation courses show as completed and follow up on any blockers.

tasks.title: Set EDU open ticket limit to 3
tasks.description: Add contractor to EDU L1 group in Linear and set initial open ticket limit to 3.

tasks.title: Attend EDU shadow sessions
tasks.description: Attend 2–3 EDU shadow sessions per week and ask clarifying questions.

tasks.title: Assign phone onboarding buddy
tasks.description: Designate a buddy for phone onboarding and align on schedule and expectations.

tasks.title: Complete phone training modules
tasks.description: Complete Phones Overview, Let’s Talk Calls, Zendesk Talk, and Phones 101: EDU.

tasks.title: Hold onboarding wrap-up meeting
tasks.description: Review onboarding feedback, confirm expectations going forward, and discuss growth areas.

tasks.title: Review conversion readiness
tasks.description: Evaluate quantitative metrics and qualitative behaviors; document recommendation for FTE conversion when headcount is available.
